## Ban-risk note

<!--
REQUIRED if the feature involves any new Discord API call, new gateway
event subscription, or any change that could plausibly trip self-bot
detection.

Cover: which endpoint(s), how often per /lookup, whether rate limit/
per-guild delay still bound it, whether a normal Discord client would
do this naturally.
-->

## Privacy note

<!--
REQUIRED if the feature stores any new data class beyond what is already
in RAM, or sends new fields into the rendered reports. Cover what is
captured, how long it lives, and whether it lands in operational logs.
-->
